summary: Active across personal Windows productivity tooling, Telegram automation for n8n, and a new Android LLM chat assistant. Long-running themes: developer tooling, side projects, and personal infrastructure.

items.title: Custom GitHub profile cards generator
items.description: Built a profile-card generator for the GitHub README, replacing a third-party action.

items.title: Mihomo proxy fork upkeep
items.description: Maintained the Mihomo fork used by FlClash.

items.title: Ozwil Android chat assistant
items.description: Started a new Android app paired with an ASP.NET Core backend for an LLM chat assistant.

items.title: Telegram-automation node release
items.description: Iterated on the Telegram automation node for n8n.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Polished the file-tagging utility through to a Microsoft Store release.

items.title: Quick image-labeling utility
items.description: Built a small on-host image labeling tool for personal projects.

items.title: Personal Neovim setup
items.description: Stood up a personal IDE configuration.

items.title: Telegram-automation node stability
items.description: Stability work on the Telegram automation node for n8n.

items.title: Telegram automation foundations
items.description: Bootstrapped the Telegram-via-n8n integration as a maintained fork.

items.title: Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Continued development of the Windows file-tagging utility.

items.title: Personal projects and exploration
items.description: General exploration and incremental work across personal repositories.
